category_sources: source_facts.description says "Minimal file upload/pastebin service"; official repository README repeats that description and documents HTTP upload/server features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rustypaste; official GitHub repository title and README use Rustypaste/rustypaste.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes features, installation, usage, server, and client sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/orhun/rustypaste, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a file upload/pastebin service; official README lists file upload, URL shortening, authentication, expiring links, and server usage.
